title: Kindness & Respect
description:
- **Netiquette**: Treat others the same way you want to be treated. Insults, provocations, or toxic behavior will not be tolerated.
- **No Hate Speech**: Discrimination of any kind (racism, sexism, homophobia, etc.) will result in an immediate ban.
- **Conflicts**: Please settle private disputes via Private Message (PM) and not in the public channels.

title: Chat Discipline
description:
- **Topic Relevance**: Please use the channels according to their purpose (e.g., memes only in #memes).
- **Avoid Spam**: Please do not unnecessarily ping staff members; avoid excessive use of emojis or All-Caps messages.
- **Language**: The primary language on this server is English.

title: Safety & Privacy
description:
- **Data Protection**: Never publish private data (addresses, phone numbers) belonging to yourself or others.
- **NSFW Content**: Posting pornographic, glorifying violence, or illegal content is strictly prohibited.
- **Advertising**: Self-promotion for other Discord servers or social media channels is only allowed after consulting with the moderation team.

title: Voice Channels (VC)
description:
- **Background Noise**: Ensure appropriate microphone quality. Please use "Push-to-Talk" if you have loud background noise.
- **Voice Changers**: The use of annoying soundboards or voice changers is prohibited.
- **Recordings**: Recording conversations without the explicit consent of all participants is forbidden.
> _Ignorance of the rules is NO excuse!_
